'''Galentro Heavy Works''' was a major conglomerate. They owned and operated the [[Jaemus shipyards]], and controlled the government of [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]]. They were most famous for their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] design, the [[Enforcer-class picket cruiser|''Enforcer''-class picket cruiser]]. [[Galentro Armaments]] was a subsidiary company.

They worked heavily in the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Company-stub}}
